competitors.name: ts-run-types (type)
ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.union([
        RT.array(RT.string()),
        RT.array(RT.number()),
        RT.array(RT.boolean()),
        RT.object({a: RT.string(), aa: RT.boolean()}),
        RT.object({b: RT.number()}),
        RT.object({c: RT.bigint(), aa: RT.literal('string')}),
      ])
    )

competitors.name: typia
typebox
competitors.source:
c(
    Type.Union([
      Type.Array(Type.String()),
      Type.Array(Type.Number()),
      Type.Array(Type.Boolean()),
      Type.Object({a: Type.String(), aa: Type.Boolean()}),
      Type.Object({b: Type.Number()}),
    ])
  )

competitors.name: zod
competitors.source:
c(z.union([
    z.array(z.string()),
    z.array(z.number().finite()),
    z.array(z.boolean()),
    z.object({a: z.string(), aa: z.boolean()}),
    z.object({b: z.number().finite()}),
  ]))
